scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @trading-platform/api" "npm run dev -w @trading-platform/web" "npm run dev -w @trading-platform/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @trading-platform/common && npm run build -w @trading-platform/api && npm run build -w @trading-platform/web && npm run build -w @trading-platform/admin
scripts.check: npm run typecheck -w @trading-platform/common && npm run typecheck -w @trading-platform/api && npm run typecheck -w @trading-platform/web && npm run typecheck -w @trading-platform/admin
scripts.infra:validate: terraform -chdir=infra/terraform/aws init -backend=false && terraform -chdir=infra/terraform/aws validate && terraform -chdir=infra/terraform/gcp init -backend=false && terraform -chdir=infra/terraform/gcp validate
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @trading-platform/api && npm run lint -w @trading-platform/web && npm run lint -w @trading-platform/admin
